eccm._doc: ECCM (Electronic Counter-Counter-Measures) recommended actions per band and state. Keyed by band name + state ('interference', 'jamming', 'degraded'). Source: FM 3-12 Cyberspace and Electronic Warfare Operations. Keep strings short — they render in a 1-line red banner and in a quick-reference table.

lora_868.interference: Narrowband interferer on EU868. Shift to alt LoRa sub-band (867.X) or ramp spreading factor.
lora_868.jamming: Barrage on EU868 (ISM). Switch mesh to Iridium SBD relay; report MIJI-9 (freq, time, duration) to hub.
lora_868.degraded: Sustained elevation — monitor; if >5 min, shift to alt sub-band.

aprs_144.interference: Narrowband on 2 m. Check HT squelch + PL tone; move to packet BPQ digipeater peer.
aprs_144.jamming: VHF 2 m barrage. Switch APRS to HF (30 m) or mesh relay; file MIJI-9 to net-control.
aprs_144.degraded: VHF noise rising — monitor antenna VSWR and nearby RF sources.

gps_l1.interference: L1 interferer (common: in-car jammers). Derate GNSS stratum; warn timesync subsystem.
gps_l1.jamming: GPS L1 jamming — DO NOT trust GNSS fix. Fall back to peer-consensus time + dead-reckoning.
gps_l1.degraded: L1 noise floor elevated — confirm antenna sky view before blaming jammer.

lte_b20_dl.interference: B20 (800) interferer. Modem may auto-fallback to B8 (900); monitor RSRQ.
lte_b20_dl.jamming: B20 DL jamming → 4G + SMS on 800 unreliable. Pin modem to B8 carrier; enable Iridium SBD.
lte_b20_dl.degraded: B20 degraded — cell breathing or distant jammer. Watch for escalation.

lte_b8_dl.interference: B8 (900) interferer. Modem may auto-fallback to B20 (800); monitor RSRQ.
lte_b8_dl.jamming: B8 DL jamming. Pin modem to B20; expect SMS degradation. Escalate if both bands hit.
lte_b8_dl.degraded: B8 degraded — monitor; check carrier aggregation.

generic.interference: Narrowband interferer. Consider alt channel / antenna repositioning.
generic.jamming: Broadband jammer likely. Fall back to alternate bearer; file MIJI-9 report.
generic.degraded: Sustained elevation above baseline — monitor; no action required yet.

eccm.miji9: MIJI-9 report fields: (1) type M/I/J/I · (2) affected freq · (3) call signs · (4) equipment · (5) strength/modulation · (6) mission effect · (7) anti-jam actions taken · (8) time of occurrence · (9) location. TAK/CoT relay fires automatically on state transitions (type b-m-p-w-j).
